notice: All inventions described herein are protected by 51 provisional patent filings with the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO). Unauthorized reproduction, reverse engineering, or commercial exploitation of these methods is prohibited.

areas.description: Continuous Semantic Logic gate mechanics — the foundational innovation replacing Boolean logic with geometric truth functions. Patents cover THRESHOLD, AMPLIFY, SUPPRESS, ROUTE, MERGE, SPLIT, and OBSERVE gate types, their vector-space implementations, chaining protocols, and integration with transformer-based inference pipelines.
keyInnovations: Real-time gate state persistence in Redis

areas.description: Methods and systems for applying Sacred Geometry constants — φ, π, √2, √5, Fibonacci sequence — as structural parameters in AI orchestration layers. Covers orchestration graph topology, inter-node distance metrics, and self-similarity enforcement across agent hierarchies.
keyInnovations: Sacred Geometry constant injection at compile time

areas.description: System-wide application of the golden ratio (φ = 1.618033988749895) to hardware resource allocation, neural layer dimensionality, timeout and retry intervals, attention head counts, and scheduler tick rates. Produces naturally self-similar, scale-invariant AI systems.
keyInnovations: φ-ratio layer width sequences in transformer stacks
Golden ratio resource partitioning in cloud schedulers

areas.description: Three-dimensional semantic memory architecture indexing memories across semantic content (x-axis), temporal recency (y-axis), and contextual relevance (z-axis). Covers pgvector extensions, custom φ-scaled distance metrics, associative memory recall algorithms, and cross-session memory consolidation protocols.
keyInnovations: 3D semantic coordinate system for AI memory
φ-scaled cosine distance in vector retrieval
Cross-session memory consolidation via centroid clustering
Temporal decay functions derived from φ

areas.description: Integration of NIST-standardized post-quantum cryptographic algorithms — CRYSTALS-Kyber-768 and CRYSTALS-Dilithium2 — into AI agent communication protocols. Covers key encapsulation for agent handshakes, digital signature verification for instruction integrity, and hybrid classical/post-quantum transition strategies.

Dynamic AI model routing systems that select optimal inference providers based on CSL gate logic, task semantic classification, latency SLOs, cost budgets, and domain expertise profiles. Covers provider abstraction layers, fallback chains, shadow routing for A/B testing, and latency-weighted routing tables.
keyInnovations: Semantic task classification for model matching

areas.description: 17-Swarm Matrix coordination protocols for 20+ concurrent AI agents across 89 cognitive bee-type specializations. Covers swarm formation algorithms, inter-swarm communication buses, emergent consensus mechanisms, and task decomposition strategies that distribute work across heterogeneous agent populations.
keyInnovations: Emergent consensus via CSL MERGE gates

areas.description: Seven-archetype cognitive routing system mapping tasks to agent behavioral profiles: Owl (wisdom/analysis), Eagle (vision/strategy), Dolphin (communication/empathy), Rabbit (agility/execution), Ant (coordination/labor), Elephant (memory/retention), and Beaver (construction/building). Covers archetype detection, task-to-archetype matching, and blended archetype composition for complex tasks.
keyInnovations: Blended archetype composition for multi-domain tasks
